feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Procurement, cloud edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Procurement, cloud edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enable Ariba PR Edit Approval only for Total PR Cost Changes
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for guidance to update the configuration for Ariba PR approval flow. Currently we have configured and applied different rules for approval in terms of resubmit however, there is requirement where business wants to retrigger the approval only when PR edit and total value changes in terms of increase only. Current config, when PR line item quantity and price changes, then PR trigger for Approval. I have tried different conditions and rules, but could not succeed the result. So appreciate if someone guide me and confirm that is it possible to retrigger the PR approval only when there is increase in total cost of PR, instead of increase in line item Qty and price. (Example : Line item 1 : Qty - 10 and Unit Price - 100 and Line Item 2 : Qty -15 and Unit Price - 100. PR Edit - Line Item 1 - Qty - 15 and Unit Price - 100 and Line Item 2 : Qty - 10 and Unit Price - 100. For this scenario currently PR trigger for approval due to one of line item qty and unit price increase, so we don't want this retrigger approval.)

entry.title: Ariba training for Brazilian Localization
entry.content:
Dear all

For the Brazilian localization there are some special fields like Material usage + Material origin, Mat. category, NCM code ....  I am looking for Ariba course (or any training material) in order to understand how Ariba works in the Brazilian Localization, especially the integration of these fields in Ariba Guided Buying, Catalogs, Sourcing, Contracts ...

Thanks in advance!

Alexandre Arcanjo Pereira

entry.title: Replacement for SAP SRM when migrating to S/4 HANA On-premise
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you tell me what all are the alternatives one have for replacement SAP SRM and SAP Lean Catalog, when one migrate to S/4 HANA On-premise?

This is a case were SAP SRM is not extensively used, but limited to Self-Service Procurement functionality in SAP SRM system to create shopping carts, confirmation using lean catalog, punch-out catalogs, free text and limit etc. We also have SAP Lean Catalog. Purchase Orders are created in ERP and Invoice is also handled in ERP.

Is Ariba is the only option or do we have any products which can meet todays SRM+Lean Catalog functionality in SAP S/4 HANA On-premise as well?

If you propose Ariba, is it possible to buy licenses for whaever modules we need in Ariba alone?

Regards

Vineeth Varghese

entry.title: ECC to S4HANA Migration Impact on Ariba P2P Purchase orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are migrating ECC to S4HANA via brownfield approach with existing Business Partners and Master Data. There is existing integration using CIG with Ariba P2P and Sourcing. 

During Data Migration, can we keep open POs (with PO numbers) from ECC in S4HANA? or Is there a need to close and recreate the POs in S4HANA?

A2A @SAPSupport @Basavant

entry.title: RFQ IDOC not triggered to Ariba from S/4
entry.content:
After creating and  publishing the RFQ using Fiori app Process purchase requisition,outbound IDOC (ARBCIG_REQOTE) is not triggered and gives a warning message "No active outbound service for appl object xxxxxxxxxx"

Kindly help  to identify what is missing in the system?

entry.title: How can we enable / trigger Ariba email notifications for invoices which are in "Composing Status"?
entry.content: There are some scenarios where the suppliers are unable to send invoices over network due to various reasons, in those cases they email the invoices to the respective requester & they create paper invoices in Ariba buyer account. There are cases where requesters initiate paper invoices but sometimes ends up in composing status without submission. we are trying to understand if there is any way or workaround to get email notification triggered for all invoices which are in composing status, any assistance is much appreciated.

entry.title: Unable to receive line item on Goods Receipt document in ARIBA
entry.content: I am unable to do receipt for the line item highlighted below because the qty field is greyed out. Why does this happen and how to receive this item?

entry.title: Does Ariba have an inbox?
entry.content: Does Ariba have an inbox? as I get notifications saying so.

entry.title: Email notification to Ariba Supplier after the payment of Invoice in S4HANA
entry.content:
I wanted to understand if an email notification can be triggered to the Ariba Supplier after the payment is processed in S4HANA.

Ariba (Invoice)-->S4H(Invoice Processed)--> Email notification to Supplier 

SAP Ariba Procurement, cloud edition SAP Ariba Sourcing

entry.title: This requisition was sent to SAP S/4HANA. Orders, receipts, and invoices are created in SAP S/4HANA,
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are implementing SAP Ariba Buying for a customer. Normally, in previous projects, once a PR is approved, a message is sent to S4, we receive the order number generated and replicated in Ariba. The order can then be accessed in Ariba and received.

However, now we run into a problem: after approving the PR in Ariba, the process continues in S4, where it has to be approved again. Once converted to an order, only the ID is returned in the history tab of the ERP, not being able to receive and displaying the message:

Before integrating SAP Ariba with the ERP, everything worked as in the first scenario I mentioned. But after the integration, it behaves as in the second scenario. Does anyone know what could be the reason for this?

Thanks in advance for the help.

Regards,

Rodrigo

entry.title: what is IMS-4483 ?
entry.content: I am trying to send a set of documents through Ariba but got a big date difference between transmissions and saw that the acknowledgment date was a week later normally it is the same day.

entry.title: How to take a stack trace in SAP Ariba.
entry.content:
1.Should I enable parameter Application.Procure.EnableEnhancedLoggingForServiceRequisitions to get the stack trace?

2.I would like to know the specific steps to obtain the stack trace in Ariba.

3.It is possible to obtain the stack trace of a system error that occurred in the past using the above steps? If I can't get it, are there any alternatives?

entry.title: Sending ERP initiated service entry sheets to Ariba Buying and from there to the network?
entry.content:
Due to customisations we are currently unable to release the create service entry sheet option in Ariba Buying to our end-users. 

Instead, our end-users are creating SeS in ECC and we are sending them back to Ariba Buying through CIG. This works fine, except that the ERP-initiated SeS which are created in Ariba Buying are not forwarded to the Ariba Network from Buying. This is different behaviour from what we see if we (manually) create a SeS directly in Ariba Buying, in which case it is sent to the network.

I suspect that the ERP-initiated SeS not being seen as a paper-based service entry sheet by Ariba Buying and therefore it is not being routed to the AN.

Does anyone know if this is a known limitation, or if there is a way to get the ERP initiated service sheets imported in Ariba Buying, and from there routed to the Network?

entry.title: What is Federated Process Control (FPC) in SAP Ariba?
entry.content:
I am looking for information that will explain Federated Process Control (FPC) within SAP Ariba. I believe it might have to do with multiple-ERP configurations, but I am not sure if it is solely related to multiple-ERP configurations. I have searched SAP for Me and the SAP Help Portal and am not finding any information that explains what Federated Process Control (FPC) is, when it would be used, or any benefits of using it. Additionally, is there a way to determine if a client has Federated Process Control (FPC) enabled on their site? Any direction towards available resources on this topic would be greatly appreciated!!

Thank you!

entry.title: Service sheet reversal from S4 HANA to Ariba
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we are having a unique scenario linking time entry process in S4 and service entry sheets creation in S4 and linking the SES into Ariba ( since all purchase requisition to Invoicing is happening in Ariba).

Sequential steps.

1. Create Ariba Service PR with child line items in Ariba upon approval the requisition is converted to a purchase order in ERP and PO number is sent to Ariba Network via Ariba Buying. ( The worker information is captured at the Purchase order level)

2. Contingent workers will enter time in custom solution developed over S4 HANA and time entry is made in S4 HANA and approved in S4 HANA

3. Approved time entries are converted into the service entry sheets in S4 HANA and exported into Ariba ( we are having commodity code mapping issue for imported SES) which Ariba team is looking into the issue

challenge - For time entry reversals in S4 HANA, SAP creates the Reversal SES with return indicator and new SES with corrected value, we also have the initial SES in Ariba before reversal. 

Note - we have reached out to our SAP Shared services team, raised a case and we haven't got any valid response apart from sharing the CIG guide.

we are looking for a process how ERP SES reversals are integrated with Ariba so that we can look into enhancement options to fulfil end to end requirements.

Observations.

1. The reversal SES generated in ERP payload doesn't have any indicator or negative value since system is trying to create reversal SES also as a new SES in Ariba.

Example - Original approved time entry created - SES 1

Time entry reversal - SES 2 ( with returns indicator)

Corrected Time entry - SES 3

entry.title: How do you synchronize suppliers in SAP Ariba with Business Partners post refresh?
entry.content:
Ariba Experts,

When a client conducts a refresh of their QAS environment with their PRD environment and copies all their PRD Business Partners, how do you synchronize them with the SAP Ariba Test environment, which will already have suppliers from previous integrations with the QAS, implementation, and previous refreshes? Since there are already suppliers in the SAP Ariba Test environment, many of them will have the same ERP Vendor ID as the copied Business Partners from PRD. Additionally, when a new supplier is created in the SAP Ariba Test environment and integrated with with QAS, there is a possibillity that the new ERP Vendor ID assigned will already exist in the SAP Ariba Test environment and therefore not completely integrate.

For example, a client just completed their second QAS refresh in two years and their PRD environment has ~4400 Business Partners that were copied to the QAS environment while the SAP Ariba Test environment has ~14,000 suppliers.

I understand that SAP Ariba does not delete suppliers, but deactivates them.

I am trying to understand the best approach for synchronizing the refreshed QAS Business Partners with the SAP Ariba Test environment. There must be a method of appropriately deactivating the previous SAP Ariba Test suppliers to support a supplier master data import of Business Partners to maintain ERP Vendor ID and other IDs so that the SAP Ariba Test supplier database is synchronized with the QAS Business Partner data base.

Any information on how best to do this would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Send the PR data to HANA without Budget check
entry.content:
We have a Requirement to send the PR details from Ariba to HANA. But there is no Budget check here.

Are there any detailed configuration for the above requirement?

entry.title: Exception: No associated client ID found with the given ANID
entry.content:
I am trying to access the Ariba Network Purchase Orders Supplier API. I have created an application and registered it for the API, requested and received approval and generated client secret. With client ID and secret, I can retrieve an OAuth2 token. When I request Ghttps://openapi.ariba.com/api/purchase-orders-supplier/v1/prod/orders with the token in Authorization header, the API key in apikey header and the ANID of my organization in the X-ARIBA-NETWORK-ID header, I am receiving the following error message (status 401):

HTTP Status: 401
Exception: No associated client ID found with the given ANID

How can I associate my client ID with the ANID?

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Ariba Network Purchase Orders Supplier API: How to update order status?
entry.content:
We are using the Ariba Network Purchase Orders Supplier API to retrieve orders and order line items from SAP Ariba. Working fine. We would now like to change the order status and mark the processed orders as acknowledged. How can we do this using the Ariba Network Purchase Orders Supplier API? Or is there another API for this use case?

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Thomas

entry.title: How to Send Service Sheet from External System to Approval Workflow and ERP in Ariba?
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,
 
We have configured the ImportExternalServiceSheetPull to post service sheets from an external system (not ERP) to Ariba. The service sheet is successfully posted, and the SES is created. However, we are encountering an issue where the SES directly moves to the "Processed" status without going to ERP.
 
We would like to understand if it is possible to post the SES from an external system, route it through an approval workflow in Ariba, and then send it to ERP only after approval.
 
Has anyone configured a similar scenario or can provide insights on how this process can be achieved? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.
 
Thank you!
